name: Kyle Sockwell
oneLine: Former Arizona State swimmer turned swim-media personality, now COO of the College Swimming League.
bio: Kyle Sockwell swam at Arizona State under coach Bob Bowman, where he was team captain, before pivoting into swim media. He built a following starting on Vine and now reaches tens of thousands across YouTube and social platforms with meet recaps, interviews, and play-by-play. He has called the Big 12 Swimming and Diving Championships on ESPN+ for six consecutive years and previously ran media for FloSwimming. He is currently COO of the new College Swimming League (CSL), launched alongside CEO Rob Kent.
style: Personality-driven swim media: meet vlogs, athlete interviews, social-first short clips, and ESPN+ commentary.
notable: COO of the College Swimming League (CSL)
Six consecutive years as Big 12 Swimming and Diving Championships play-by-play on ESPN+
